admin.title: Admin Panel

home.whatIsText: CodeIT is a gamified platform designed to teach C programming step by step. It's interactive, beginner-friendly, and fully in-browser — no setup needed.
home.feature1: Write basic C programs with real code
home.feature2: Understand variables, data types, and control flow
home.feature3: Use loops, functions, and pointers effectively
home.feature4: Apply logic through hands-on quizzes and challenges
home.progress1: Earn XP, level up, and keep your streak alive
home.progress2: Test your code instantly with a built-in C compiler
home.progress3: Track your progress and unlock new lessons
home.progress4: No stress — learn at your own pace, from any device

login.title: Welcome Back
login.resetSuccess: Reset link sent! Check your email.

signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.success: Signup successful! Please check your email to confirm your account. Once confirmed, you can log in and start learning!
